chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1214 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4783/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 30-10-2025 Mr. Nusrat Hussain J. Memon, Advocate for Respondent No.6 Mr. Badar-u-Zaman Kamboh, Principal, Constitute Law College, Naushahro Feroze / Respondent No.7 in person Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate files vakalatnama of Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate on behalf of Respondent No.3, which is taken on record. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. Same was the position on the last two consecutive dates of hearing; even on 16-10- 2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the Petitioner or any intimation is received. This petition is liable to be dismissed for non- prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, matter is adjourned to 30-10-2025 with intimation notice to Counsel for the Petitioner.” Though, intimation notice was issued to the Counsel for the Petitioner for today, even then nobody has turned up to pursue this Petition, which is pending since, 2024 without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing it. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
